evaluation_protocol.name: rolling_origin_prequential_backtest_v2
evaluation_protocol.candidate_training: Each fold uses only canonical rows at or before its forecast origin.
evaluation_protocol.interval_calibration: Direct-model residual quantiles use a purged later temporal holdout; no in-sample fallback is accepted.
evaluation_protocol.artifact_scope: This report evaluates fold-specific retraining, not an in-place mutation of the protected evaluator artifact.
